list.name: session
list.label: Session
list.query: SELECT session_uid FROM session GROUP BY session_uid ORDER BY MAX(time) DESC LIMIT 20

list.name: lap_a
list.label: Lap A
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT current_lap_num FROM lap_data WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND current_lap_num > 0 ORDER BY current_lap_num

list.name: lap_b
list.label: Lap B
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT current_lap_num FROM lap_data WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND current_lap_num > 0 ORDER BY current_lap_num

targets.rawSql:
WITH lap_info AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (num_laps) latest_lap_time_ms, latest_sector1_time_ms, latest_sector2_time_ms, latest_sector3_time_ms, num_laps
  FROM session_history
  WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND latest_lap_time_ms > 0
  ORDER BY num_laps, time DESC
)
SELECT now() AS time,
  li.latest_lap_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "Total",
  li.latest_sector1_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S1",
  li.latest_sector2_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S2",
  li.latest_sector3_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S3"
FROM lap_info li
ORDER BY li.num_laps ASC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_a - 1

WITH lap_info AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (num_laps) latest_lap_time_ms, latest_sector1_time_ms, latest_sector2_time_ms, latest_sector3_time_ms, num_laps
  FROM session_history
  WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND latest_lap_time_ms > 0
  ORDER BY num_laps, time DESC
)
SELECT now() AS time,
  li.latest_lap_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "Total",
  li.latest_sector1_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S1",
  li.latest_sector2_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S2",
  li.latest_sector3_time_ms / 1000.0 AS "S3"
FROM lap_info li
ORDER BY li.num_laps ASC
LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_b - 1

WITH deduped AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (num_laps) latest_lap_time_ms, latest_sector1_time_ms, latest_sector2_time_ms, latest_sector3_time_ms, num_laps
  FROM session_history
  WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND latest_lap_time_ms > 0
  ORDER BY num_laps, time DESC
),
lap_a AS (
  SELECT * FROM deduped ORDER BY num_laps ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_a - 1
),
lap_b AS (
  SELECT * FROM deduped ORDER BY num_laps ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_b - 1
)
SELECT now() AS time,
  (lap_a.latest_lap_time_ms - lap_b.latest_lap_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "Delta",
  (lap_a.latest_sector1_time_ms - lap_b.latest_sector1_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "S1 Δ",
  (lap_a.latest_sector2_time_ms - lap_b.latest_sector2_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "S2 Δ",
  (lap_a.latest_sector3_time_ms - lap_b.latest_sector3_time_ms) / 1000.0 AS "S3 Δ"
FROM lap_a, lap_b

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.speed AS "Lap A Speed"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.speed AS "Lap B Speed"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

WITH lap_a_data AS (
  SELECT FLOOR(ld.lap_distance / 10) * 10 AS dist_bucket, AVG(ct.speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM car_telemetry ct
  JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
  WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
  GROUP BY dist_bucket
),
lap_b_data AS (
  SELECT FLOOR(ld.lap_distance / 10) * 10 AS dist_bucket, AVG(ct.speed) AS avg_speed
  FROM car_telemetry ct
  JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
  WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
  GROUP BY dist_bucket
)
SELECT a.dist_bucket AS "Distance", (a.avg_speed - b.avg_speed) AS "Speed Δ (A-B)"
FROM lap_a_data a JOIN lap_b_data b ON a.dist_bucket = b.dist_bucket
ORDER BY a.dist_bucket

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.throttle AS "Lap A Throttle"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.throttle AS "Lap B Throttle"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.brake AS "Lap A Brake"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.brake AS "Lap B Brake"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.gear AS "Lap A Gear"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.gear AS "Lap B Gear"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

WITH lap_a_data AS (
  SELECT FLOOR(ld.lap_distance / 10) * 10 AS dist_bucket, AVG(ld.current_lap_time_ms) AS avg_time
  FROM lap_data ld
  WHERE ld.session_uid='$session' AND ld.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
  GROUP BY dist_bucket
),
lap_b_data AS (
  SELECT FLOOR(ld.lap_distance / 10) * 10 AS dist_bucket, AVG(ld.current_lap_time_ms) AS avg_time
  FROM lap_data ld
  WHERE ld.session_uid='$session' AND ld.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
  GROUP BY dist_bucket
)
SELECT a.dist_bucket AS "Distance", (a.avg_time - b.avg_time) / 1000.0 AS "Cumulative Δ (s)"
FROM lap_a_data a JOIN lap_b_data b ON a.dist_bucket = b.dist_bucket
ORDER BY a.dist_bucket

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.steer AS "Lap A Steer"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_a AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

SELECT ld.lap_distance AS "Distance", ct.steer AS "Lap B Steer"
FROM car_telemetry ct
JOIN lap_data ld ON ld.session_uid = ct.session_uid AND ld.car_index = ct.car_index AND ld.frame_id = ct.frame_id
WHERE ct.session_uid='$session' AND ct.car_index=$car_index AND ld.current_lap_num = $lap_b AND ld.lap_distance >= 0
ORDER BY ld.lap_distance

WITH deduped AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (num_laps) latest_sector1_time_ms, latest_sector2_time_ms, latest_sector3_time_ms, num_laps
  FROM session_history WHERE session_uid='$session' AND car_index=$car_index AND latest_lap_time_ms > 0
  ORDER BY num_laps, time DESC
),
lap_a AS (
  SELECT latest_sector1_time_ms AS s1, latest_sector2_time_ms AS s2, latest_sector3_time_ms AS s3
  FROM deduped ORDER BY num_laps ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_a - 1
),
lap_b AS (
  SELECT latest_sector1_time_ms AS s1, latest_sector2_time_ms AS s2, latest_sector3_time_ms AS s3
  FROM deduped ORDER BY num_laps ASC LIMIT 1 OFFSET $lap_b - 1
)
SELECT 'S1' AS "Sector", (lap_a.s1 - lap_b.s1) / 1000.0 AS "Delta (s)" FROM lap_a, lap_b
UNION ALL
SELECT 'S2', (lap_a.s2 - lap_b.s2) / 1000.0 FROM lap_a, lap_b
UNION ALL
SELECT 'S3', (lap_a.s3 - lap_b.s3) / 1000.0 FROM lap_a, lap_b
